entry.title: Re: SAP WM inbound delivery post error"Post the HUs for g...

entry.title: Re: MRP - Forecast query
entry.content: Hi, can you send screenshot from Forecast... and Page 5 from MRP-Settings ?

entry.title: Re: Conversion Rule for Inbound IDoc
entry.content: Is there a possibility to check if the conversion rule has been for sure performed? (I mean without an actual new test case, only the error in BD87)?

entry.title: Re: Certificate Expire Notifications Alert in SAP Cloud Integration - iFlow
entry.content:
Hello Satish,

Thanks for writing this blog. Really appreciate.

I am facing issue while reaching Odata via free trial account. However, while connecting to Odata with Oauth 2.0 authorization, i am getting "401 unauthorized" error although token being passed is correct.

 


Could you please advice?

BR,
Krushna Band

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay - Assistance Needed with Individual Goal...
entry.content:
Hi,

It seems that setting this option in XML: autoSyncP4PData="false" is my solution. I will run additional tests to confirm this.

entry.title: Re: Maintain Controlling Area in CBC - S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
@Wajed  In Cloud,  default content is always shipped with Standard Hierarchy 0001. Standard Hierarchy 0001 is the default structure and during cost center master data creation all cost centers get assigned to 0001.

The Standard Hierarchy 0001 is always fixed and no lower level cost center groups can be added. Standard Hierarchy 0001 is not editable in the Manage Cost Center Groups app by design. Reference the Create Cost Center and Cost Center Group (BNM) accelerator for additional information. Create Alternative Cost Center Hierarchy using the Manage Cost Center Group.

Customers can create an alternative cost center hierarchy as this is freely defined/maintained by customers and any lower level groups can be assigned. Each cost center must be specifically added to your defined alternative cost center hierarchy via Manage Cost Center Group app.

Thanks
Harvind Narayan

entry.title: Re: Standard change RFC auto status update once standard...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am looking for below, currently we are using confirm action to move the RFC from implemented to complete state. But without any action how it can be done. SO that RFC is confirmed automatically whenever it reaches implemented status. Thanks once again.

entry.title: Email Notification for Final Approval in Flexible Workflow for PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using Flexible Workflow (top-level task: WS00800238) for Purchase Order (PO) approvals. The requirement is as follows: 

  1. When a PO is created, it goes to the frontend for multilevel approval via the Flexible Workflow.
  2. An email notification should be triggered only after the final approver approves the PO.
  3. Currently, the email is either not triggered or is being sent at intermediate approval levels, which is not desired.

Request for Assistance:
Could you provide detailed steps or configuration to:

  • Ensure that the email triggers only after the final approver approves the PO.
  • Validate any specific event settings, conditions, or prerequisites in the Flexible Workflow for this scenario.
  • Highlight any enhancements, BAdIs, or additional workflow configurations that need to be implemented for achieving this functionality.

Additional Details:

  • Flexible Workflow top-level task: WS00800238
  • SAP Version: [7.5 SP level 3]
  • Module: SAP MM / Workflow

Please advise on the necessary configurations or troubleshooting steps to fix this issue.

 

Any help is greatly appreciated.

Kind Regards,

Abhisekh

entry.title: After creating a new work schedule, while running time evaluation it is showing error.
entry.content:
Hi,

 Created a new work schedule and after assigning it to IT0007 and running time evaluation, it is showing this error 

Can someone explain on what can be done

entry.title: Re: Can I implement ICMR witohut Group reporting?
entry.content: Nice and informative blog @NaveenP1 . I had a question though- When it’s both GR and ICMR in scope, then where should we begin? Should we implement GR first then ICMR or vice versa. Please let me know your thoughts and please share if you have any reference material.  Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Error Message 15613 in MEINT for routing change
entry.content:
Hello Sergiy.

Thank You!

This solved our Issue at customer, after update SAP ME 15.3 including updating the DB driver for SAP ME (with the result, that the SAP MEINT Standard Interfaces CTC Wizard has to be executed again inclduing overwritting custom settings).

Regards

Matthias

entry.title: Re: Error Message 15613 in MEINT for routing change
entry.content:
Hello Sergiy.

Thank You!

This solved our Issue at customer, after update SAP ME 15.3 including updating the DB driver for SAP ME (with the result, that the SAP MEINT Standard Interfaces CTC Wizard has to be executed again inclduing overwritting custom settings).

Matthias

entry.title: Re: Error Message 15613 in MEINT for routing change
entry.content:
Hello Sergiy.

Thank You!

This solved our Issue at customer, after update SAP ME 15.3 including updating the DB driver for SAP ME (with the result, that the SAP MEINT Standard Interfaces CTC Wizard has to be executed again inclduing overwritting custom settings).

Regards

Matthias

entry.title: Creation of Pick-Up Freight Orders per Container for several Containers simultaneously
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have a question regarding the creation of pick-up freight orders for containers of an ocean freight booking.

Briefly about the general conditions: An Advanced TM (Embedded) is used and the release is SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS 2.

In an ocean freight booking, you have the option of selecting one or more container units or containers in the “Items” tab and then creating a corresponding freight order via Create --> Pick-up Freight Order.

If several containers are selected, they are all combined into one pick-up freight order. However, I would need one pick-up freight order per container. So you would have to select each container individually and create one such order. If there are only a few containers in an ocean freight booking, this is also a viable option.

However, I am faced with the challenge that an ocean freight booking often contains many containers. The solution described above is therefore not efficient for this scenario.

So my preference would be to select all containers and create one pick-up freight order for each of them at the same time. I have already researched this over a longer period of time and in various ways, but unfortunately I have not yet found a sensible way to map this.

I therefore hope that someone here has an idea of how to handle this scenario. It feels like this should not be a special case for which there is no solution in the standard system, but unfortunately I have not yet found one.

Thank you very much for your support!

entry.title: Re: Vendor missing inside PR created through MRP Run
entry.content:
Hi Caetano,

Thanks for your reply !!

Yes i checked and requirement date lies within the Validity date of Source list (6th Nov 2024 - 31.12.9999).

Also noticed that another PR of same Material displays Vendor in MD04, but not this PR. Even MRP has been executed today.

       

Enclosed screenshots if this might help !!

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: Automatic Batch Determination in Consignment Issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I want to achieve automatic batch determination in consignment issue (CCIS order type) based on plant. For this, I have activated the batch determination for item category CIN. I have completed the config by doing the following:

1.Created a table with order type and plant, assigned it to strategy, strategy to procedure and lastly assigned the procedure to Sales Area and sales doc type. 

2. Maintained the record for the Sales doc type and plant

Now, while creating the order, i get the message "It was not possible to determine a batch"

Can you please help me determining a batch automatically in consignment issue. 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Architecture Guide
entry.content: Tech Tonic blog  .

entry.title: HTTP Status 500 - internal server errror SAP BO BI 4.3
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been trying for days to install SBOP BI Platform Servers 4.3 SP04 Patch 900 and then SAP DATA SERVICES 4.3 SP3 WINDOWS. After the platform installation SAP BO BI is running. After the installation Data Services,  I get a HTTP 500 error and only the CMC of Data Services works. If I start wdeploy to recreate, then I can call the CMC of SAP BO BI again, but I can no longer open the CMC of Data Services and get an HTTP status 404 - Not Found error.

I just can't get both to work. With 4.1 and 4.2 I never had problems installing and opening both. Does anyone know what to do?

Thanks René

entry.title: Object Store Referece: Failed to update the instance ....not allowed to change the plan of reference
entry.content:
Hello! We are using object store reference instance in our mta like described here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/object-store-on-sap-btp-setting-up-instance-sharing-on-object-store/ba-p/13615448

In our mta we have something like the below with a valid uuid:

 

 

resources:
- name: objstore
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: objectstore
    service-name: objstore-ref
    service-plan: reference-instance
    config:
      referenced_instance_id: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxx-xxxxxxxxxx

 

 

 Deployment the first time works fine. When we do a second deployment, an warning is generated:

 

Updating service "objstore-ref" failed: Service broker error: Failed to update the instance xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxx-xxxxxxxxxx. It is not allowed to change the plan of a reference instance.
 
It's not a real error because the deployment continues but still weird.
We're not trying to update the plan. In BTP we can see this instance is set to reference-instance, just like in the mta.
 
Any idea why this is happening and how to avoid it?
 
Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: No authorization to access service group 'API_PURCHASEREQUISITION_2'
entry.content: @inesmartins How is the destination configured? If a technical user is used for authentication, does the user have the same authorizations as the user used in Postman?

entry.title: Re: How to change Control Account in SAP Business One Dur...
entry.content:
Hi @salah35 ,

  1. Balance Offset with JE - Post a JE choosing the BP account you're offsetting as both Debit and Credit. In this case, I'm moving a customer balance from 123010 to 123000. Obviously, you'll need to consider Debit and Credit differently when it comes to a Supplier:



  2. Internal Reconciliation - Reconcile the original invoice with the newly created JE:


  3. Post the payment to the new account - Now that you've reconciled the original invoice with the JE, the latter will be available for clearance. Preview the JE first and check if the control account is now the desired one.

This is just an example, do not forget to set dates and other parameters according to your accounting needs and principles, but that should do the job.

*** If this answer resolves your question, kindly consider marking it as accepted. This helps our community by highlighting useful solutions. Thank you! ***

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: SAP Application Interface Framework - Licensing
entry.content:
Hi Alexander,

What if we want to make use of automatic reprocessing of an /MMPUR INVREGQIN message via this mechanism: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_APPLICATION_INTERFACE_FRAMEWORK/1cefaed5b7a3471cb08564e54d5ba866/63bfba53d97def7ee10000000a4450e5.html 

Do we need a license for that?

Regards

Tom

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content: Dear @edeniz yes as part of the SAP Learning Hub partner subscription you have 4 attempts. This means 4 trials to pass an exam. Each trial that is passed or failed will be deducted from this entitlement. This means when you pass at the first trial the exam you can take other exams as well and when you pass as well at first trial you can in theory achieve 4 certifications with this subscription. Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Re: Insert text type and content in notes tab in Edit Fre...
entry.content: hello @Rohit have you defined the Text Type, Schema etc for FU and assigned it also.

entry.title: SDK Code in Hana
entry.content:
Hi

  I have below query and i want to do it through SDK for Hana version. Can anyone guide.

 

Select sum(*) from ODPO A
WHERE
A.cardcode = "C00001' and A.Canceled = 'N' and A.Docstatus = 'O'

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Easy Expert functionality does not contain specific c...
entry.content: Hi Ralp,

entry.title: How to create BS flows from FF67 with Flow Builder Plus?
entry.content:
In "old" One Exposure there were OpBS_BTE_2810 for creating BS flows in FQM_FLOQ (through old bs adaptor class cl_fqm_adaptor_bs).

In "new" Flow Builder Plus there is new adaptor cl_fclm_adaptor_bs but no calls from ff67 and no flows generated.

entry.title: Re: Is SQL Anywhere viable and sustainable
entry.content:
MCMartin, Thank you for the information. Our Database files (spaces) together are only about 600 Gig (we do have documents, but on the network, db only has paths to them). Client connections average about 500 connections hour to hour.

The consultant pushing us to switch is pushing us in other areas, too.

We love SQLA, but we have not liked the diminishing support/knowledge from SAP. It is the only DB software that is pretty self-sufficient.

Your answer helps me to combat the consultant's negativity about the software and push to switch now. I hope more can chime in with more information I can use. Thank you again.

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to CAP CDS 8: A living document of fixes and lessons learned
entry.content: thanks for summarizing your findings 🙂 one minor remark if someone stumbles over it: it is `@cap-js/hana` and not `@sap-js/hana`.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAL S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance
entry.content:
Dear YO-YO ,

Yes, you could use the mentioned by you appliance template and create an appliance out of this template. It contains also SAP Best practices for SAP S/4HANA and demo scenarios.

Based on https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/planned-appliance-template-updates-in-2024/ba-p/13580730 the appliance template, which contains Fiori configuration only is SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 .

Best regards,

Tsvetinka

entry.title: Re: ANDROID BUILD - Build Log Error Message: Unknown error, contact support for more details.

entry.title: Hosting CodeJam in Chennai India BTP and ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I hope this message finds you well. We are interested in hosting an SAP CodeJam event at our office premises to enhance our team’s knowledge and hands-on experience with SAP technologies.

Location -Basis Cloud Solutions, No.162, Essar Building, 2nd Floor, Kunrathur High Road, Gerugambakkam, Chennai 600122
Topic - 1) Hands-on with the BTP CLI and APIs  2)  ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
Date - 24th January 2025
Time - 9 AM to 5 PM

Please let us know the availability of trainers, to guide our team through practical exercises and real-world scenarios.

Regards

Madhu Sudhan.R

entry.title: Re: BTP ABAP Environment alternative to SET LANGUAGE
entry.content: For messages its ok. But for text element? Any suggestion ? "Set language" was the way, now i dont know how to deal with it...

entry.title: API Integration
entry.content:
I work at a startup that provides business management solutions. One of our services includes the ability to upload JSON files, such as expense reports, from our platform to the user's accounting management system.

We have successfully implemented this functionality with platforms like QuickBooks and Xero using OAuth, and we would like to do the same with your system. However, as I understand, in your case, each client has a local instance, and interactions are conducted through the client's admin.

I would appreciate your clarification on the following points:

  1. How can we obtain an access token (via OAuth or PAT)?
  2. Where can we find your API documentation, and do you provide a sandbox environment for testing?

I would greatly appreciate a detailed response.

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content:
Hi @thomas_beck, i have question, if i wanted to the this copy step but, many to many, how would i do it?
I want this action, because when i copy my months to planning months, i want to do it instantly selection them all, and not doing it one by one

entry.title: How can I configure the Z field added to the BUT000 table via web ui in the CRM system to the BP.
entry.content: How can I configure the Z field added to the BUT000 table via web ui in the CRM system to the BP screen?

entry.title: Can we connect to ECC system without creating Technical & business system in SLD for that ECC system
entry.content:
Hi All,

Would like to know if we can connect to ECC system without creating Technical & business system in SLD and importing it in Integration Directory?

Instead of importing Business system for ECC system can i create Business component and create outbound interface and with RFC connection between ECC and my flow in SAP PO can i get the IDOC in system PO?

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Just Ask Feature Capability
entry.content:
Overview:

In this blog, we will explore about "Just Ask" feature with sample use cases. As described below  - Its a Powerful feature provided by SAP Analytics Cloud - to effectively search and depict visualizations based on the Natural Language query.

Recently i had an opportunity to demonstrate the capability to the business stakeholders , so i herewith sharing the same contents for the larger audience to benefit.

 

This enables the business user to generate the visualizations without any help from Analysts  / IT professionals. The following slide shows how to use the same.

To implement the "Just Ask" features there are some admin level authorizations required, please follow the below shown information as a pre-requistes.

 

Once configuration is enabled for "Just Ask". Please navigate to the below shown icon on the SAC system. the launch screen will looks like the below :

As shown below select the appropriate SAC model which you would like to extract analysis from. In this case

i have selected the standard model "BestRunJuice_SampleModel".

 

Once model is selected, the business user can ask questions in a natural language. for example in the below scenario - we have asked system to  getting the "Gross Margin"   by year in a line chart.

second example is instructing the system to change the visualization in the form of bar chart.

More importantly we can perform certain conditional checks  and depicts the visualizations on its own automatically. For example in the below screenshot - the business can ask question like  "discounts less than 1 million".  

 

as described - the user can perform different set of condition using the natural language and fetch desired results.

Summary of Key Benefits : 

1. Query the results based on natural language text

2. copy & past the visualization in to the new story.

3. Generate visualizations  based on certain conditions and rules. 

4. sort the data and show it in the required format

5. Rank the results and display in the charts.

6. Display row/column table format to show case the complete details as per business requirement.

 

Conclusion :

This feature is very handy for the business users  with dynamic requirements. They can generate their own reports and visualizations  without much dependency with analysts and experts from IT.

Thank you !   &  Happy Learning !

entry.title: Re: DBSQL_SQL_INTERNAL_DB_ERROR SQL code: 2
entry.content: How did you solve the problem? thanks

entry.title: Re: Post checks after RKS(Rolling Kernel Switch).
entry.content: The kernel version is 789 and SPlevel 200

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to read XLSX files without Microsoft Excel?
entry.content: abap2xlsx, XCO. What is the issue with abap2xlsx?

entry.title: Where can I learn the key aspects of Product Compliance?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Exploring SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance 2022 learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will give insight on the concepts, processes and capabilities of product compliance with its solution areas product marketability, dangerous goods and safety data sheets.

Learning objectives

  • Learn and articulate the key aspects of Product Compliance.
  • Develop a comprehensive understanding of the business processes, roles, and integration points related to product compliance within the value chain.
  • Learn the fundamental concepts and relationships of compliance objects and requirements, while emphasizing the significance of compositions, substance management, and regulatory frameworks.
  • Apply the fundamental concepts, data models, integration processes, and compliance requirements necessary for assessing and managing the marketability of products and raw materials.
  • Illustrate the comprehensive workflow and integration of dangerous goods classification and processing across various business operations.
  • Learn the concepts, processes, and compliance requirements of safety data sheets (SDS) and gain the ability to manage and process SDS effectively within various business roles.

Prerequisites

  • Product Compliance in a Nutshell

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: CORS(Cross origin resource sharing)
entry.content:
With AS ABAP release 7.52 we will ship real CORS support built into the server. is this statement true or not?

Can somebody answer me that, This comment has confused me whether I need to incorporate the change or the CORS feature is now built in one.

entry.title: Re: How to use dynamic variables in WHERE in ABAP program .
entry.content: carrid = 'AC' OR carrid = 'AF'. is the value for gt_where

entry.title: Re: Easy Expert functionality does not contain specific c...
entry.content:
Hi Maria,

you can try loading the data or create your own Expert rule set to write the data as you need them.

Best regards,

Ralph

entry.title: Fixed Asset Depreciation Starting Date Change
entry.content:
Hi all

Could you please tell me how the depreciation start date is derived in the fixed assets master data in Sap Business One?

Below is an example.

The Fixed Asset Capitalization Date as per our Internal Auditor Report is 21.01.2023. Based on the Auditor Report the ordinary Depreciation values are found Below:

Auditor Report

ItemCode

Capitalization Date

Asset Group

Auditor

Ordinary Depreciation Value

Sap Ordinary Depreciation Value

Difference

 

1

40000101

21-01-2023

Spares

522.72

530

7.28

 

 

 

 

As per the Auditor Report, the Depreciation Values differ from Sap. If I change the Depreciation Start Date to the next day of the Capitalization Date (22-01-2023), the Sap Ordinary Depreciation Value and Auditor Values match.

 

Auditor Report

ItemCode

Capitalization Date

Asset Group

Auditor

Ordinary Depreciation Value

Sap Ordinary Depreciation Value

Difference

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

1

40000101

22-01-2023

Spares

522.72

523

0.28

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Kindly suggest any solutions to this.

entry.title: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content:
Hi,

Good Day.

We are using the latest version of SAP GTS with the EHP8 upgrade, but by mistake, some transports from the development environment, which were created before the EHP8 version, were imported into the quality environment. As a result, these transports have overwritten the EHP8 version when checking the version management of certain objects. Is there a way to restore the EHP8 version as the active version again?

entry.content:
Hi,

You can try the Merging data from multiple sources approach and see if it works for you: Centralized Provisioning with Identity Directory | SAP Help Portal

Ivelina

entry.title: Global Class Static Attribute
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing a challenge in accessing the value stored in the static attribute of a global class. Please refer to the scenario below.

We are creating a Sales order from an Inbound IDOC using standard message type ORDERS. 

I have activated customer exit EXIT_SAPLVEDA_001 (VEDA0001) where I am filling the static attribute of a custom global class. 

I want to retrieve the value of this static attribute in USER_EXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT. But when I check this attribute in user exit it is blank. 

What might be the reason for it?

 I don't want to use Memory ID, is there any other approach?

entry.title: Integrating SAP SuccessFactors to Microsoft 365
entry.content: We are planning to integrate SAP SuccessFactors into MS 365, and we would like to ask how the testing is done. We know that once we have enabled the basic integration and the other required setup, the SF app will be available to the target users in the Microsoft Teams app. However, we are not sure if each instance (e.g., test, development, and production) will have a different SuccessFactors app in Microsoft Teams. Please advise. Thank you!

entry.title: Customer 00000XXXXX: Customer master table KNVV is missing.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While posting forwarding settlement document I am getting the following error "Customer 00000XXXXX: Customer master table KNVV is missing", Can anyone can let me know how to resolve this issue.

Note : The error I am getting this in Ocean freight Scenario.

Your prompt reply is highly appreciated.

Kind Regards,

PK

entry.title: DP91 price are taked from KE26 instead of VK13 conditions.
entry.content:
Dear members

When we are creating billing request using DP91 the price condition choose internal cost rate KP26 instaed of VK11 condition entered for WBS element and material.

First ZHON which is from VK13 is ignored and KP26 activity price which is considered as manualy enterred are on priorty.

if i change ZHON manual entries C to B then DP91 don't work.

Please help.

thank you.

entry.title: Re: Easy Expert functionality does not contain specific c...

Hi Maria,

 

You're right, I didn't think about that one. So you can only try doing a data load without deleting any data.

 

Best,


Ralph

entry.title: Re: Easy Expert functionality does not contain specific c...
entry.content: Hi Maria, you're right, I didn't think about that one. So you can only try doing a data load without deleting any data.Best,

entry.title: Re: Post checks after RKS(Rolling Kernel Switch).
entry.content: Are there any general checks that we need to do after implementing Rolling Kernel Switch, independant of systems like there are many prerequisites present just like that anything for post checks?

entry.title: 3244147 - How to retrieve the classification data from a batch?
entry.content:
Hi experts

I have a question to this note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3244147/E

Multiple CDS views can be associated in order to retrieve the classification data from a batch.
I_BATCHDISTINCT can be used to retrieve the Object No.  With the Object No. I_CLFNOBJECTCHARCVALFORKEYDATE can be used to retrieve the Characteristic Internal ID, Char. Value.
Then I_CLFNCHARCDESCFORKEYDATE can be used to get the characteristic description and  I_CLFNCHARCVALUEFORKEYDATE , I_CLFNCHARCVALUEDESCFORKEYDATE can be used to get the value description. 

In S4H Public cloud I tried to create a custom CDS view with scenario "Data Extraction" - the mentioned views would be associated to  I_BATCHDISTINCT . But I am getting the error message:

Selected associated Data Source: I_ClfnObjectCharcValForKeyDate must belong to the same bussiness area as Primary Data Source

How can I get these views into one view? I need them to extract to BW4H later on.

Attached please find two screens...

Thanks for your help, Tom

entry.title: SAP Market Rates Management differs with ECB exchange value.
entry.content:
How to compare the market datafeed currency exchange rates of the historic data with the currency exchange rates in the App Currency Exchange Rates.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Market Rates Management differs with ECB exchange...
entry.content: Use App Request Historical Market Data - Datafeed Fiori Apps library link

entry.title: Re: GRDC Run Data Mapping, Import status error
entry.content: In the Import tab?

entry.title: Re: Creation of bgRFC and calling in a program
entry.content:
Great article. Thanks.

I have one situation with the standard WS_BGRFC_INBOUND000 destination. I have one async consumer proxy for which I want to create some custom table logging every time the WS gets called. This includes both business application and SRT_MONI restart. Can I somehow enhance this standard process? Or can I create a separate destination with custom handler?

entry.title: Customer Onboarding for SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain
entry.content:
Are you a new SAP IBP Customer ready to start your project implementation?

To make sure you start with the right foot on your SAP project, we have designed a Customer Onboarding Journey dedicated to SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain (SAP IBP) solution.

What should you do?

Visit the SAP IBP Onboarding Resource Center, your one-stop shop for a smooth onboarding process. Access ungated enablement resources, including guides on how to use SAP for Me, how to access your system, and useful information on what to expect and how to prepare for the entire project implementation.

Register for the Onboarding Webcasts, which are quarterly live sessions designed to get you up to speed with the onboarding process. Plan, register, and join these sessions to gain insights and clarify any questions you may have. If you can't join live, on-demand content is also available.

Your Onboarding Journey in Four Phases

Either the content available in the SAP IBP Onboarding Resource Center and the content delivered in the Onboarding Webcast, both follow the same Customer Onboarding Journey:

 This is the content in more detail:

Phase 1. Get Started with SAP 

The main objective is to make sure customers understand the SAP IBP provisioning process and become familiar with the expected communications from SAP, enabling them to log in to the systems. Additionally, we aim to make sure customers are aware of SAP channels, particularly SAP for Me, and know how to get support from SAP for both technical and non-technical issues.

Main topics covered:

  • Understand your onboarding journey
  • Learn about SAP channels and s-user setup
  • Get access to your system
  • Get familiar with SAP Support

Phase 2. Plan your Implementation

The main objective is to provide the customer a high-level knowledge on how to better run, manage and accelerate their SAP IBP project implementation using the tools and resources included in their subscription.

Main topics covered:

  • Run your project implementation with SAP Activate
  • Manage your project with SAP Cloud ALM
  • Accelerate your project with SAP Best Practices
  • SAP tools to support your Data Integration
  • Roles & system testing

Phase 3. Get Enabled

The main objective is to present the customer with free learning and enablement resources to help them effectively use the SAP IBP solution.

Main topics covered:

  • SAP IBP Solution overview
  • SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Community
  • Offerings in SAP Enterprise Support

Phase 4. Prepare to Go Live

The main objective is to ensure a smooth Go-Live and prepare customers to run their business effectively.

Main topics covered:

  • Get ready for final project tasks
  • SAP offerings & services for go-live support
  • Post-live resources
  • Keep innovating after go-live

In Conclusion

The onboarding journey with SAP is meticulously designed to ensure that you’re fully prepared for a successful implementation, since contract signature to go-live. Take the time to explore, plan, and engage with the resources at your disposal. The road to a successful go-live with SAP IBP starts here.

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Hi @Bernardo_Santos1, you can do this via an Advanced Formula (e.g. via using dimension properties to map month to planning month) or X-Model Copy Step (same source and target model, map each month to planning month). For the regular copy step this is not possible to map across different dimensions.

entry.title: Re: GRDC Run Data Mapping, Import status error
entry.content: yes, I have no found error in import log, and in traceability log

entry.title: Is there option to avoid the popup No routing found while creating production order
entry.content:
While creating production order in CO07 without material below popup is coming.

In ECC the system automatically choose default operation (OPJG) in such case and not showing any popup. But in Hana it shows this popup. Is it possible to avoid this and to choose default operation directly?

Also in ECC routing selection option is there in OPL8

But in Hana its not there.

Do this have any impact on this popup?

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content: I'm getting an error while accessing the link you provided:

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content: No data Unable to fetch data at the moment. This might be due to a server error or a network issue. Please try again later.

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content: https://me.sap.com/notes/2253663

entry.title: Testing API Binding: Help with new layout
entry.content:
New interface vs old interface

I'm trying to set up a Universal REST API integration with my database. I'm facing issues with the new layout when trying to create a record (POST) using Test API. With the old layout I could Test with formulas or static texts. In the new layout it seems only to accept static values.

Additionally when I Test the API with the same schema in both layouts, I get no errors with the old layout, however I'm getting invalid payload errors with the new layout

What's changed and how can I get the option to test API payloads with formulas?

entry.title: Re: Easy Expert functionality does not contain specific c...
entry.content: Hi Ralph, thinking on dataload method, I'm not sure that's even a possibility now on checking transaction CG33 > Parameters button. There is nothing on there re Value Assignment controls in general, let alone settings options to make this work. Going back to creating an expert rule, in SPRO > EHS > Manage User Exits, there are a number of Function Modules prefixed with C1E5_SUB_EXPERT**. For standard EHS Expert Rules, the FM uses 'C1E5_SUB_EXPERT_EVALUATE'. Would one of those be a workable solution in terms of inserting an additional Validity Area entry into an existing and specific instance? I'm sorry for the twenty questions, it's like a puzzle piece right now that I'm keen to solve. Thanks in advance. Best, Maria

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content: I still cannot open it - I'm getting the NO DATA error.

entry.title: Where can I learn how to use the Environment Management module in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Discovering SAP EHS Management, environment management learning journey.

Overview
Gain insight into environmental compliance and emission management processes within the SAP EHS Management, environment management module. The learner will be able to successfully create and manage location data, compliance requirements, and compliance scenarios.

Learning objectives

  • Explore the regulatory and permit compliance process.  
  • Explore the emission management process.  
  • Comprehend the Master Data Concept and the Master Data Creation in SAP EHS Management, environment management
  • Identify the creation process of compliance requirements. 
  • Create compliance requirements, environmental limits, regulatory lists, and equations. 
  • Create and setup the data collection process.  
  • Create and setup sampling, calculations, and location-aggregations. 

 

Prerequisites

  • Nice to know information 
    Introduction to SAP S/4HANA Environment, Health & Safety

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content:
The link is working fine for me. Not sure what is occurring. The contents for this KBA:

++++++

Symptom

Support plans for the latest releases of IBM's CICS and z/OS on the products listed below:

  • Mainframe Connect Server Option for CICS
  • Mainframe Connect Client Option for CICS
  • Mainframe Connect DB2/UDB Option for CICS

Environment

  • The latest version of Mainframe Connect products at the time of this KBA is version 15 SP06.
  • The latest version of Replication Agent for DB2 at the time of this KBA is version 15 SP08.

Resolution

Since these products do not have any OS and CICS dependences, they are expected to work on the newer CICS and z/OS versions.  

The MFC products for CICS use IBM's CICS Command Level and CICS Socket Interface API's.
Therefore the products are isolated from the OS and CICS versions.

Latest Mainframe certifications for MFC and Rep Agent for DB2.

Software Version Supported

MFC

RADB2

Latest z/OS versions supported

 

See PAM

See PAM

Latest CICS version supported

 

6.1

NA

Latest DB2 version supported

 

12

12

Oldest z/OS version supported

 

See PAM

See PAM

Oldest CICS version supported

 

5.1

NA

Oldest DB2 version supported

 

11

11

Note: Rep Agent for DB2 (One-off EBF 29069) has been certified on DB2 v12 (M100 up to M508)  and z/OS 2.4.
One-off EBF 29069 is expected to support all function levels for DB2 v12 unless IBM makes major changes to DB2 within a functional level.
Open a support case with SAP to get one-off EBF 29069.
For more details on  EBF 29069 please see the  attached cover letter (EBF29069_README.docx)
NOTE:  Replication Agent for DB2 has been End of Mainstream Maintenance (EoMM), as of December 31 2021, Please see SAP Note 3059657)

See Also

KBA 3408369 - End of mainstream maintenance for Sybase Mainframe Connect 15.0.

entry.title: Re: How can I configure the Z field added to the BUT000 t...
entry.content:
I would answer, use EEWB 'Easy Enhancement Workbench' or AET 'Application Enhancement Tool '.

(But sorry, I've only done these enhancements in reverse order, EEWB then enhance BP Web UI)

entry.title: Re: Enhancing SAP Digital Manufacturing with Extended iDoc: Addressing the Absence of Operation Long
entry.content: @tandras_sap currently we don't have any standard ways to display this information in POD, but it is considered for future release enhancements.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit: Error at prepare Project
entry.content:
This error appears, at preparing the project in Migration Cockpit at Migrate Data Directly from SAP System.

Corresponding SAP Notes are implemented

entry.title: Re: Sharepoint CSV-File integration in Datasphere's Data...
entry.content:
Look to the 3425630 - Sharepoint Open Connectors supports only English language for now - SAP for Me 

For us it was the solution

entry.title: Replacement for CO06 in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
In SAP R/3, we use the transaction CO06 (Manual Availability Assignment). Is there currently an equivalent or replacement for this functionality in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

The app "Pick Components by Production Order" does not meet our needs, as we are not using production orders in our process.

Thank you in advance for your insights!

SS

entry.title: Re: How to use dynamic variables in WHERE in ABAP program .
entry.content: i think you need to convert the internal table to  string,

entry.title: Re: CAP: cds deploy to hana: HDI Deployment failed
entry.content:
Had the same. The problem with allowing connections to IPs in HANA instance.
Go to the Hana Instance Tools, press Manage Configurations, go to Connections and select "Allow all IP addresses".
This helped me to

entry.title: Re: Authentication using JWT in SAP API Management
entry.content: Hello Experts, any suggestions on this please?

entry.title: Re: SLD Data Supplier to to SAP's Support Backbone, for A...
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

While waiting for a better solution, I wanted to mention that our AS Java has sent their SLD Data to the SAP Support Backbone by using a reverse web proxy on our site.

I created a reverse proxy xxx.mydomain that proxies requests to https://supply.landscape.services.sap.
In the AS Java, I have configured the following SLD_DataSupplier connection.
---
URL : http://xxx.mydomain/sld/ds or https://xxx.mydomain/sld/ds
System ID: Empty
Client : Empty
Language : Empty
User Name: Technical communication S-User
Password: Pasword of the Technical communication S-User
---

In the AS Java, ping test of SLD_DataSupplier connection worked.
Collecting and Sending the SLD also returned a success.

In the maintenance planner, I see that the System has been updated.

Therefore it seems to work. It is complicated compared to using a proxy server in SLD_DataSupplier.
But I have not found an easier way.

If you would know a better way to configure this SLD_DataSupplier, please do not hesitate to share.

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Re: How to use dynamic variables in WHERE in ABAP program .
entry.content: Yes, this is correct and there are functions/classes that will take a table and do this conversion too.
